race.comment: MISS CRINSHAWN (3) produced a clear career best when 2L third at Dundalk stepping up to 2100m last time. Further distance here could unlock some more improvement. May take some beating. KHORMOR SYD (5) also made a positive beginning to the campaign when beaten 1.25L on return over 1900m. Could strip fitter for that. Commands respect. CHURCH MOUNTAIN (1) ran a fair fourth revisiting this surface in latest (2000m). Usually seen around the Dundalk all-weather track. Edging back to a workable rating. CALAMINT (11) finished two places ahead of the just mentioned last time under this jockey though was wayward late. Might figure.
